narrative:
Jackson Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 773 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a clear Republican lean of 6.7 percentage points.
